message: feat: Spec Evolution Lab visual overhaul + repair duplicated code blocks Comprehensive visual enhancement of the Spec Evolution Lab component, performed by a Gemini agent, followed by surgical repair of code duplication the agent introduced, and a cleanup pass by Claude. Visual enhancements (Gemini): - Inspector header: Terminal icon, "Forensics_Inspector" italic title, gradient top-line accent, appearance-none file selector with Filter icon indicator and min-w-[180px] - Tab bar: Mixed_Case labels ("Diff_Stream", "MD_Snapshot", "Raw_Archive", "Evidence_Ledger", "Changed_Nodes"), chip backgrounds with hover states, animated underline via motion.div layoutId="tab-underline" - Diff view: Status line with pulse dot, "Source_Corpus_Diff_A→B" / "Patch_Sequence_Stream" labels, rounded button styling (was rounded-full) - Content area: CRT scanline effect overlay, blur-based tab transitions (was y-offset based), flex-1 to fill available height - Sidebar: "Archive_Nodes" heading with Terminal icon, motion.button items with whileHover slide, "Stream_Buffer_Capacity" bar at bottom - Chart: Grid decoration overlay, "Revision_Temporal_Flow" heading, enhanced legend bar with motion.button items, power-on indicators, scanlines on active chips, FrankenGlitch on "Taxonomy_Ledger" label - Background: CRT scanlines, VHS glitch static animation, radial gradients, "System_Integrity_Green" status badge in header - Various rounded-full → rounded-md changes for a more technical aesthetic Code repair (Claude): - Removed duplicated chart footer buttons (old TAXONOMY_LEGEND + COMMITS alongside new TAXONOMY + NODES) — 17 orphaned lines including an extra that broke JSX nesting - Removed duplicated Inspector diff controls (old CORPUS_A_B + EXTRACT_JSON alongside new Corpus_A_B + Extract) — 25 orphaned lines including two extra tags and a dangling ternary close Cleanup pass (Claude): - Fixed "Propabilistic" typo → "Probabilistic" in chart footer stats - Removed dead `filterNote` variable (the Gemini agent replaced the footer that used it with the new Analysis_Mode/Telemetry_Metric/Bucket_Resolution grid, but left the variable definition behind) - Simplified `selectCommit` to use direct setState instead of unnecessary functional updater form (the `prev` parameter was unused) - Removed unused `iconName` destructuring from tab bar map (icon names were defined in the tuple data but never rendered) CSS module: Widened side-by-side diff left column from minmax(8.5rem, ...) to minmax(10rem, ...) for better readability. Result: tsc --noEmit clean, bun lint 0 warnings (was 3), build succeeds. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
